name: The Great Trading Company${{APP_NAME_SUFFIX}}
description: Your colonial trading house for enterprise operations — manage Salesforce CRM ledgers, ServiceNow service manifests, SAP cargo manifests, HubSpot spice bazaar, Flight Tracker sky watch, and DocuSign seal & quill, all from one command post.

conversation_starters.title: 🔄 Lead-to-opportunity pipeline
conversation_starters.text: Show me the latest leads. I want to review them, update any that are qualified, and then check the opportunities pipeline.

conversation_starters.title: 🚨 Triage IT incidents
conversation_starters.text: Show me open incidents sorted by priority. I need to check the critical ones and update their status.

conversation_starters.title: 📦 Procurement check
conversation_starters.text: Show me recent purchase orders from SAP and check if we have the materials in stock for order 4500000001.

conversation_starters.title: 📊 Campaign performance review
conversation_starters.text: Show me the marketing email performance from HubSpot. Which campaigns have the best open rates?

conversation_starters.title: 🆕 Log a sales lead and raise IT ticket
conversation_starters.text: I met a prospect — create a new lead for Sarah Chen at CloudBase Corp. Also raise a ServiceNow incident for VPN access for the new client demo.

conversation_starters.title: 🏭 Supplier and materials audit
conversation_starters.text: Show me all business partners from SAP, then check the materials inventory. I need to verify stock levels for product TG11.

conversation_starters.title: 📋 Service request status
conversation_starters.text: Show me the latest service requests from ServiceNow. I need to check the laptop request and see what items are pending delivery.

conversation_starters.title: 💼 End-of-day operations check
conversation_starters.text: Give me a quick overview — show me open CRM leads, any critical IT incidents, and today's purchase orders.

conversation_starters.title: ✈️ Flight tracker
conversation_starters.text: Show me departures from Heathrow (EGLL) today. I also want to check the live state of a specific aircraft.

conversation_starters.title: ✒️ DocuSign envelopes
conversation_starters.text: Show me my recent DocuSign envelopes. I need to check which ones are still awaiting signatures.
